note: Intentionally PENDING. The config (config/inference.local.mac-judge-3family.json) is validated in CI (tests/test_mac_judge_3family_config.py: 3 distinct families qwen/mlx-community/deepseek, all != subject gemma) and the judge harness already computes 3 pairwise kappas + majority vote for >=3 judges. But config validity is not a result: no adapter-vs-base preference has been judged by a 3rd family. Promotion follows the pre-registered verdicts in the measurement_spec: VALIDATED only if all 3 families are significant across >=3 seeds AND kappa>=0.40 is reached (pairwise or forced-choice consensus); otherwise the honest outcome is CANDIDATE (deflation-bound). canClaimAGI stays false either way. See the m3-sft-2family-judge-not-validated-2026-06-29 row in agi-proof/failure-ledger.md.
